name: Mirror — iranopasmigirim
description: Read iranopasmigirim.com offline. Synced every few minutes from a public, signed GitHub repository.
content_security_policy: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
